title: fumaria capreolata var. macrosepala
intro: Fumaria capreolata var. macrosepala, also known as Rock Fumitory, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the fumitory family. Traditionally, Rock Fumitory has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include potential applications in reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting immune function. Rock Fumitory is typically prepared as a herbal infusion, and it can be found in some herbal remedies, often used to treat colds, coughs, and other respiratory issues.
